fit_basis: phase-level measured cycles, not system-total residual forcing
interface width should come from RTL, not fitted from timing
burst policy should be verified from DMA RTL/testbench
configuration sequence count should come from RTL/software driver

current_value: Includes CPU config and DMA/SRAM transfer intervals from visible RTL widths, but not direct full-chip RTL-clean evidence.
fit_basis: Must be re-run through --system-calibration before any paper main-table use.
